title: アオハル杯5戦目・決戦を終えて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We lose the finals. Rice Shower blames herself for
the result, but thanks to some reassurance from
Haru Urara, she regains her smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After their victory, Little Cocon and the others
proudly report to Ms. Kashimoto that they were
able to beat their target times that morning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They tell her they pushed themselves beyond
their limits because they love her and wanted to
destroy the beliefs she's been clinging on to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deeply touched by their sincerity, Ms. Kashimoto
calls off Operation Oversight. She also steps
down as temporary director and decides to start a
new life as a trainer at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon and the others run to her, happy at
this turn of events.
